title: How One Hour Before Dawn Changes Who You Are
caption:
What you do before 6 AM is who you actually are.

Not who you perform for the rest of the day.

The first hour isn't a productivity tip — it's a theology of priority. Who you feed first wins your day. Roll over and check your phone first and anxiety sets the tone before you've said a word. Open the Word first and you've decided who you're listening to before the day opens its mouth.

The silence of 5 AM isn't empty — it's where God gets a word in. One chapter, one prayer, a few minutes of just sitting still. You'll be surprised how loud He is when you're finally quiet.

You won't feel the difference in a week. But six months from now, the men around you will notice something different and they won't be able to name it.

Character built in private shows up everywhere in public.

—

Save this and use it tomorrow morning.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #earlymorning #thework #scripture
